ranked_jobs.title: AI Transformation & Operations Lead
why: Role focuses on bridging operational reality with technological capability, indicating some element of transformation
Involves partnership with Technology teams to extend tool impact and identify new technical opportunities
Role is remote, which aligns with preference for remote jobs

ranked_jobs.title: Product Manager, Commerce Systems
why: Role focuses on harmonizing and unifying complex internal billing, seller systems, and financial data warehouses into a single platform, aligning well with enterprise platform transformation and system consolidation.

Involves leadership in designing infrastructure control planes that serve multiple disparate stakeholders (internal product teams, finance, legal), which maps to building and modernizing platform infrastructure at scale.
Remote full-time role with a strong emphasis on backend systems and API-first mindset, aligning well with candidate’s preference for remote product management roles focused on platform modernization.
Role requires driving strategy and navigating complexity across multiple teams and systems, which ties into operating model redesign and enterprise-wide system modernization.

ranked_jobs.title: Strategy & Operations Program Manager, Risk Ops
why: Role focuses on leading complex global risk operations programs that impact business processes and operational excellence at scale
Strong emphasis on cross-functional collaboration across multiple teams and stakeholders, aligning with enterprise-wide transformation initiatives
Program management responsibilities include transforming operations and designing new processes, consistent with platform transformation and operating model redesign

ranked_jobs.title: AI Delivery Lead
why: Role involves coordinating and managing adoption and operational integration of AI/automation capabilities across multiple products and programs, suggesting enterprise-wide impact
Focus on governance, organization, SOPs, and guidelines aligns with operating model redesign responsibilities
Role supports communication, training, and adoption across division, implying cross-team influence and transformation

ranked_jobs.title: Credit Risk Program Manager, Risk Foundations
why: The role is a Program Manager position focused on credit risk, requiring program and process incubation across a broad Risk organization which aligns with enterprise-wide system and process improvements.
Responsibilities include designing and implementing scalable risk-wide frameworks and foundational policies, indicating involvement in governance and operating model redesign at scale.
The job is remote-eligible and involves partnering with multiple internal teams, supporting cross-functional initiatives and strategic commercial shifts.
